steps.title: Use the table intersection
steps.content: This question asks for the wind chill already listed in the table. Start by finding the row where the air temperature is $38^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Move to the requested wind speed
steps.content: In the $38^\circ\text{F}$ row, move to the column for wind speed $60$ mph. The entry there is $22^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Because the answer should be entered without the degree symbol, the answer is 22.
